dateRangePicker.title: DateRangePicker
dateRangePicker.description: Inline date range selector. Supports one or two visible months, quick presets, min/max length restrictions and disabled dates.

props.modelValue: Tuple with the start and end dates of the range (v-model).
props.showPresets: Shows the side panel with predefined ranges (today, this week, etc.).
props.presets: Custom presets. Each has a label and a range() function that returns the tuple.
props.color: Accent color for the selected range.
props.minRange: Minimum number of days the range must span.
props.maxRange: Maximum number of days the range can span.
props.locale: Locale for month and day names.

twoMonths.title: Two months (default)
twoMonths.desc: Shows two calendars side by side for comfortably selecting long ranges.

oneMonth.title: One month
oneMonth.desc: Compact mode with a single calendar, ideal for short ranges.

presets.title: With presets
presets.desc: show-presets adds a side panel with shortcuts (today, this week, this month, last 30 days…).

colorPrimary.title: Primary color
colorPrimary.desc: The color affects the background of the selected range and the start/end days.

outline.title: Outline variant
outline.desc: Visible perimeter border, useful on neutral backgrounds.
